basic_details.job_title: Goa PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 36 Legal Officer, Assistant Professor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Legal Officer, Assistant Professor and MorePosts
basic_details.short_information: Goa Public Service Commission (Goa PSC) Legal Officer, Assistant Professor and More Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website of Goa Public Service Commission (Goa PSC). A total of 36 vacancies have been announced through the Goa PSC Legal Officer, Assistant Professor and More Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 55 years.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Pharm, Masters in Psychiatric Nursing, M.Phil in Psychiatric Social Work, Post Graduate in Dentistry, BHMS or equivalent, Masters in Nursing, MD in concerned speciality, 1st Class Masters/Bachelors in Engineering/Technology, Degree in Mining Engineering, Masters in Geology, Degree in Law, Masters Degree with NET/SET, Ph.D. with 15 years experience
qualification.details: Assistant Pharmaceutical Chemist: B. Pharm. degree of a recognized University or equivalent with 3 years experience in a reputed Pharmaceutical concern. Govt. undertaking or Hospital having more than 500 beds, of manufacturing medicines/drugs and supervision of Pharmacy Service. Knowledge of Konkani. Assistant Professor in Psychiatric Nursing: Masters’ degree in Psychiatric Nursing recognized by the Indian Nursing Council(INC) with Five years teaching experience in Nursing after post graduation. Knowledge of Konkani. Assistant Professor in Psychiatric Social Work: Masters of Philosophy in Psychiatric Social Work with Five years teaching experience in the Psychiatric Social Work or as a Psychiatric Social Worker in teaching institution. Knowledge of Konkani. Lecturer in Oral Pathology and Microbiology: A qualification included in Part I or Part II of the Schedule to the Dentists Act, 1948 with Post-graduate qualification in concerned speciality of Dentistry from a recognized University/Institution or equivalent. Should be registered with Dental Council. Knowledge of Konkani. Homeopathic Physician: A degree of not less than 4 years duration, included in the Homeopathy Central Council Act,1973 with Enrollment on a State Register or the Central Register of Homeopathy. Three years professional experience in Homeopathy preferably in a recognized hospital or a dispensary prescribing Homeopathic Medicines. Knowledge of Konkani. Associate Professor in Paediatrics Nursing/Child Health Nursing: Master’s Degree in Nursing in concerned speciality with atleast 55% marks or equivalent with Minimum ten years teaching experience in a recognized College of Nursing after Master Degree in Nursing. Knowledge of Konkani. Associate Professor in Midwifery and Obstetrical Nursing: Master’s Degree in Nursing in concerned speciality with atleast 55% marks or equivalent with Minimum ten years teaching experience in a recognized College of Nursing after Master Degree in Nursing. Knowledge of Konkani. Associate Professor in Psychiatric Nursing/Mental Health Nursing: Master’s Degree in Nursing in concerned speciality with atleast 55% marks or equivalent with Minimum ten years teaching experience in a recognized College of Nursing after Master Degree in Nursing. Knowledge of Konkani. Senior Psychiatrist: A recognised medical qualification included in the First or the Second Schedule or Part II of the Third Schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 with Post-graduate degree in the speciality concerned. 3 years work in a responsible position connected with their speciality after post graduation degree. Knowledge of Konkani. Lecturer in Applied Mechanics (Mechanical Engineering): 1st Class Master’s Degree in appropriate branch of Engineering/Technology or 1st Class Bachelor’s Degree in appropriate branch of Engineering/Technology. Knowledge of Konkani. Lecturer in Applied Mechanics (Civil Engineering): 1st Class Master’s Degree in appropriate branch of Engineering/Technology or 1st Class Bachelor’s Degree in appropriate branch of Engineering/Technology. Knowledge of Konkani. Lecturer in Food Technology: 1st Class Master’s Degree in appropriate branch of Engineering/Technology or 1st Class Bachelor’s Degree in appropriate branch of Engineering/Technology. Knowledge of Konkani. Assistant Mining Engineer: Degree in Mining Engineering from a recognized University with Recognized Second Class Manager Certificate of competency. Minimum three years experience in Mining Field. Knowledge of Konkani. Geologist: Master’s degree in Geology or Applied Geology from a recognized University with Three years experience in the mining field connected with exploration works, preparation of geological maps and calculation of reserves. Knowledge of Konkani. Legal Officer: Degree in Law from a recognized University with Minimum three years experience in Court matters or practice of three years as an Advocate. Knowledge of Konkani. Assistant Professor in Geography: Good Academic record with at least 55% of marks or equivalent grade at Master’s Degree level in the relevant subject from an Indian University or an equivalent degree from a foreign University with National Eligibility Test (NET)/State Level Eligibility Test (SET). Knowledge of Konkani. Assistant Professor in Commerce: Good Academic record with at least 55% of marks or equivalent grade at Master’s Degree level in the relevant subject from an Indian University or an equivalent degree from a foreign University with National Eligibility Test (NET)/State Level Eligibility Test (SET). Knowledge of Konkani. Assistant Professor in Economics: Good Academic record with at least 55% of marks or equivalent grade at Master’s Degree level in the relevant subject from an Indian University or an equivalent degree from a foreign University with National Eligibility Test (NET)/State Level Eligibility Test (SET). Knowledge of Konkani. Principal in Government College: Ph. D. Degree in relevant discipline with Professor/Associate Professor with a total experience of fifteen years of teaching/research in Universities, Colleges and other Institutions of Higher Education. A minimum 10 research publications in peer reviewed journal. A minimum of 110 Research Score. Knowledge of Konkani.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor in Psychiatric Social Work
Lecturer in Oral Pathology and Microbiology
Associate Professor in Paediatrics Nursing/Child Health Nursing
Associate Professor in Midwifery and Obstetrical Nursing
Associate Professor in Psychiatric Nursing/Mental Health Nursing

salary_details.details: Assistant Pharmaceutical Chemist: As per pay matrix Level-6 Assistant Professor in Psychiatric Nursing: As per pay Matrix Level-11 Assistant Professor in Psychiatric Social Work: As per pay Matrix Level-11 Lecturer in Oral Pathology and Microbiology: As per pay matrix Level-11 Homeopathic Physician: As per pay Matrix Level-10 Associate Professor in Paediatrics Nursing/Child Health Nursing: As per pay matrix Level-11 Associate Professor in Midwifery and Obstetrical Nursing: As per pay matrix Level-11 Associate Professor in Psychiatric Nursing/Mental Health Nursing: As per pay matrix Level-11 Senior Psychiatrist: As per pay Matrix Level-11 Lecturer in Applied Mechanics (Mechanical Engineering): As per pay matrix Level 9A Lecturer in Applied Mechanics (Civil Engineering): As per pay matrix Level 9A Lecturer in Food Technology: As per pay matrix Level 9A Assistant Mining Engineer: As per pay Matrix Level-7 Geologist: As per pay Matrix Level-7 Legal Officer: As per pay Matrix Level-7 Assistant Professor in Geography: As per revised pay matrix level 10 Assistant Professor in Commerce: As per revised pay matrix level 10 Assistant Professor in Economics: As per revised pay matrix level 10 Principal in Government College: Rs. 37400-67000+AGP:Rs. 10000/- + Spl. Allowance Rs. 4500/- (As per pay matrix level 14)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Goa PSC Legal Officer, Assistant Professor and MorePosts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Goa PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Goa PSC Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Goa PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Goa PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 26th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this Goa PSC recruitment?
faq.answer: Goa Public Service Commission has announced a total of 36 vacancies for various posts through this recruitment drive. These positions are spread across different departments and specializations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Goa PSC recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under this Goa PSC recruitment is 55 years. There is no minimum age limit specified for most of the posts.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Goa PSC Various Posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary significantly depending on the post. They range from B.Pharm, Masters degrees in various specializations, Engineering degrees, Law degrees, to a Ph.D. with extensive experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates will be as per the pay matrix Level-6 to Level-14, with specific levels mentioned for individual posts, indicating a competitive remuneration package.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Goa PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Goa PSC Various Posts typically involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview. Candidates are advised to prepare thoroughly for both stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the Goa PSC recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates or specific instructions regarding fees.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article or by visiting the official website of the Goa Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Goa Public Service Commission?
faq.answer: The official website of the Goa Public Service Commission is http://gpsc.goa.gov.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to apply online.
